name: Natural Resources Defense Council
mission: NRDC works to safeguard the earth—its people, its plants and animals, and the natural systems on which all life depends.We combine the power of more tha...
theoryOfChange: The Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC) outlines its approach to driving environmental change through a 'four-pronged approach: legal advocacy, science-based research, policy development, and public engagement.' This framework describes how NRDC uses these methods as 'replicable strategies for driving real environmental change' and is presented as an 'Environmental change framework infographic.' The organization emphasizes that its success is rooted in this clear approach, detailing how these core strategies are utilized to achieve impact.

scoreSummary: Natural Resources Defense Council IncHQ shows strong impact and moderate alignment (minor risk deductions applied).

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Good donor alignment with manageable risk. Evidence quality is solid but still evolving in places.

keyConcerns.headline: 92% of expenses stay in the US despite international operations
keyConcerns.detail: Organization claims foreign operations but most spending remains domestic.

components.improvement_suggestion: Add a dedicated zakat page or clearly state whether donations are zakat-eligible.
components.name: Muslim Donor Fit

alignment.rationale: Alignment 26/50: MEDIUM Muslim donor fit, advocacy cause area

components.evidence: No beneficiary data available for cost-per-beneficiary scoring; good program ratio (≥75%) suggests reasonable delivery
components.improvement_suggestion: Publish beneficiary counts consistently so cost-effectiveness can be assessed.
components.name: Cost Per Beneficiary

components.improvement_suggestion: Publish a time-bound plan to deploy excess unrestricted reserves into mission delivery, while keeping a clear operating reserve floor.
components.name: Financial Health

risks.risk_summary: Key concern: High domestic burn: 92% of expenses stay in the US despite international operations

risks.description: High domestic burn: 92% of expenses stay in the US despite international operations

score_details.score_summary: Natural Resources Defense Council IncHQ shows strong impact and moderate alignment (minor risk deductions applied).

zakat.claim_evidence: Organization is in zakat denylist (partners but doesn't collect directly) (Source: https://nrdc.planmygift.org/cash)

all_citations.claim: The NRDC focuses on climate change, equity, and justice programs and is categorized under advocacy.
The organization reported a total revenue of $193,144,386 and maintains a 79.2% program expense ratio.
The organization utilizes awarded attorneys fees and legal advocacy as part of its operational model.
Financial records confirm the allocation of funds toward environmental protection programs.
The organization's mission is centered on safeguarding the earth and its natural systems.
The NRDC offers various ways to give, supporting its status as a recipient of voluntary charitable donations (Sadaqah).
Public financial data confirms the total revenue and asset management of the organization.

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: The organization earns a 60/100 score due to its significant financial scale and efficient use of resources, though its advocacy-heavy model results in a medium alignment for donors prioritizing direct humanitarian aid.
areas_for_improvement: Limited direct service delivery as the model focuses primarily on advocacy and capacity building
Moderate alignment for donors seeking specific religious or community-based frameworks

dimension_explanations.alignment: The organization shows medium alignment for Muslim donors as its mission focuses on the universal preservation of natural resources, which qualifies for Sadaqah [7]. While the cause urgency is high due to the advocacy nature of climate change, the donor fit is considered medium because the programs are not specifically tailored to community-specific needs [1][6].
dimension_explanations.impact: The NRDC demonstrates high effectiveness in its sector by maintaining a 79.2% program expense ratio, ensuring the majority of its $193,144,386 revenue directly funds environmental programs [2][4]. Its impact is categorized as capacity building, utilizing legal frameworks and policy advocacy to create systemic change rather than direct individual aid [1][3].

baseline_narrative.headline: The Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC) leverages legal and scientific expertise to protect the environment and public health through advocacy and systemic change.
strengths: High operational efficiency with a program expense ratio of 79.2%
Strong financial sustainability with 24.5 months of working capital
Excellent fundraising efficiency, spending only $0.13 to raise every $1
baseline_narrative.summary: The Natural Resources Defense Council IncHQ is a non-profit organization dedicated to safeguarding the earth's natural systems, focusing on climate change, equity, and justice [1][2]. In the most recent fiscal period, the organization reported a total revenue of $193,144,386 to support its global environmental initiatives [2][8].
